description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
Fixed & Improved

Login screens are being redesigned and streamlined

Fixed Linux crashes when attempting to load media in some chats

Fixed bug with some data being sent out of order, causing various bugs

When connecting a network, the popup browser no longer covers the entire window, so you can more easily cancel the login

Popup windows that ask for a confirmation code don’t freeze up any more

Small improvement to speed of catching up with chat messages

Several small UI improvements
